description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration v2 that runs on a schedule, on workflow dispatch, and on pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: CI and Formatting. The CI job runs on a matrix of operating systems, configurations, and containers, checking out the code, installing Vulkan SDK, setting up C++, building, and testing NovelRT. The Formatting job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks code formatting with clang-format, and uploads a patch if formatting fails.
